name: the-only-plane-in-the-sky
description: Garrett M. Graff's 'The Only Plane in the Sky: An Oral History of 9/11' — the definitive minute-by-minute account of September 11, 2001, told in the voices of the people who lived it.
useCase: Understand what happened on 9/11 through first-hand accounts, from the morning timeline to first responders, Flight 93, the Pentagon, and the aftermath.
knownRisks: Contains graphic descriptions of death, injury, and trauma — may be triggering
Emotionally heavy content — not suitable for all readers
Oral history format — some accounts may be incomplete or based on imperfect memory
